description_long: This object is a lever-action rifle with a classic design, featuring a long, blued steel barrel and a wooden stock and forearm. The receiver and lever mechanism are made of dark metal, with the lever loop positioned below the trigger guard. The wooden stock is smoothly contoured and finished in a rich brown, while the forearm is similarly styled and attached to the barrel with metal bands. The barrel is round and fitted with iron sights at the front and rear, and the overall profile is slender and elongated. The trigger guard is integrated with the lever, and the rifle exhibits a traditional, utilitarian aesthetic with no visible engravings or embellishments.
description: A classic lever-action rifle with a long blued barrel, dark metal receiver, and smooth brown wooden stock and forearm. The rifle features iron sights and a traditional lever mechanism.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metal receiver, and long barrel with iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle of the barrel and the slim profile of the rifle, with the wooden forearm visible below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, showing the wooden stock, metal receiver, and barrel with iron sights.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the lever and trigger guard visible below.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is formed by the rear portion of the wooden stock, which is smoothly contoured and ergonomically shaped to fit comfortably against the shoulder and in the hand. The surface is finished with a polished, semi-matte sheen, and the wood grain is visible, providing a natural texture. There are no visible checkering, stippling, or finger grooves, and the design is simple and traditional, with a slight curve for improved handling. No logos or embellishments are present.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is integrated with the lever mechanism, forming a large, rounded loop beneath the receiver. It is made of dark metal, moderately thick, and smoothly curved to accommodate the fingers during operation. The design is utilitarian, with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and lacks any squared-off edges or accessory rails.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and round, with a smooth exterior profile and a blued finish. It is not threaded, ported, or fluted, and there are no compensators or suppressor threads visible. The barrel is fitted with simple iron sights at the front and rear, and no external markings or decorative features are apparent.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the receiver or barrel. The surfaces are plain, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine is tubular and located beneath the barrel, with no visible detachable magazine base or floorplate. The end of the tube is capped with a simple, rounded metal piece, lacking any finger rests, logos, or texturing. The design is streamlined and functional.
